tools.description: Probe authenticated admin HTML reachability through allowlisted read pages.

include_send_start.description: Also prove the Send wizard start page can be read after login.

tools.name: interspire_admin_session_probe

tools.description: Export explicitly requested Interspire audience hygiene artifacts privately and return aggregate counts only.

tools.description: Resume a checkpointed audience hygiene export job for a bounded number of XML subscriber queries.
tools.name: interspire_audience_hygiene_export_resume

tools.description: Read checkpointed audience hygiene export job status without advancing the export.
tools.name: interspire_audience_hygiene_export_status

tools.description: Audit redacted campaign body safety signals without returning raw HTML.
tools.name: interspire_campaign_body_audit

tools.description: Read campaign manage rows or one campaign edit page summary.

tools.description: Write private persisted-campaign render artifacts for native-browser screenshot inspection without returning raw HTML.

tools.description: Preview applying a fixed private render artifact to a campaign template without returning raw HTML.

tools.description: Apply a previously previewed semantic EDM template edit.
tools.name: interspire_campaign_template_update_apply

tools.name: interspire_campaign_template_update_preview

tools.description: Apply one explicitly acknowledged Interspire campaign preview/test send to a single recipient. Requires guarded writes, send controls, acknowledge_test_send=true, and exact subject/HTML hash from preview; this does not prove list-specific unsubscribe or merge behavior.
tools.name: interspire_campaign_test_send_apply

_meta.proof_boundary: read persisted campaign content and prepare one-recipient preview-send proof without posting the preview route

tools.description: Preview a one-recipient Interspire campaign preview/test send without sending, scheduling, queueing, importing contacts, or mutating lists.
tools.name: interspire_campaign_test_send_preview

tools.description: Preview guarded campaign content or sender metadata edits.

tools.name: interspire_contact_import_preflight

tools.name: interspire_list_owner_readback

tools.description: Summarize Interspire contact lists and aggregate state counts.

max_lists.description: Maximum list rows to return. Defaults to 25 and is capped at 100.

tools.name: interspire_list_summary

tools.description: Apply a guarded list metadata edit.
tools.name: interspire_list_update_apply

tools.description: Preview guarded list metadata edits.
tools.name: interspire_list_update_preview

tools.description: Write sanitized private OCI send-ledger rows from an explicitly acknowledged preview plan and rerun OCI ledger preflight. Requires guarded writes, send controls, expected_plan_id, and acknowledge_ledger_write=true; this does not contact OCI or perform an Interspire send.
tools.name: interspire_oci_send_ledger_prepare_apply

_meta.proof_boundary: read a private OCI send-ledger manifest and compute sanitized ledger rows without writing the ledger or sending

tools.description: Preview sanitized private OCI send-ledger rows from a private JSONL manifest without writing the ledger, contacting OCI, sending, scheduling, queueing, importing contacts, or mutating lists.
tools.name: interspire_oci_send_ledger_prepare_preview

tools.description: Apply an explicitly acknowledged production send after strict immediate readiness proof. Requires guarded writes, send controls, production send controls, exact expected count, From, Reply-To, subject, HTML SHA-256, and the required confirmation phrase; when INTERSPIRE_REQUIRE_OCI_SEND_LEDGER=1, also requires verified OCI ledger preflight.
tools.name: interspire_production_send_apply

tools.description: Apply a previously previewed Interspire scheduled queue cancel/delete plan. Requires guarded write environment flags.
tools.name: interspire_queue_control_apply

tools.description: Preview cancel/delete plan ids for Interspire scheduled queue rows. Preview is read-only.

max_rows.description: Maximum scheduled rows to inspect. Defaults to 25 and is capped at 100.

tools.name: interspire_queue_control_preview

tools.description: Read scheduled queue and stats page summaries without triggering cron.
tools.name: interspire_queue_stats_readback

_meta.proof_boundary: combine campaign audit and Send wizard readback without submitting a seed or production send

tools.description: Combine campaign body audit and no-send wizard proof into seed-readiness gates.
tools.name: interspire_seed_readiness_gate

tools.description: Apply one explicitly acknowledged seed send after immediate readiness proof. Requires INTERSPIRE_GUARDED_WRITES=1, INTERSPIRE_SEND_CONTROLS=1, acknowledge_seed_send=true, and a bounded expected recipient count; when INTERSPIRE_REQUIRE_OCI_SEND_LEDGER=1, also requires verified OCI ledger preflight.
tools.name: interspire_seed_send_apply

_meta.proof_boundary: render Send wizard Step2/final editable page without submitting the final send boundary

tools.description: Render the send wizard through the no-send preview boundary and verify queue/stat invariants.

campaign_id.description: Interspire campaign/newsletter id expected on the final editable send form.

expected_recipient_count.description: Optional expected recipient count. When provided, a mismatch is reported as a warning.

list_ids.description: Interspire list ids to select for the no-send wizard proof.

max_queue_rows.description: Maximum queue/stat rows to compare before and after the no-send wizard render.

tools.name: interspire_send_wizard_readback

tools.description: Query exact approved Interspire admin form fields with unredacted values. Requires INTERSPIRE_SENSITIVE_READS=1 and acknowledge_sensitive_output=true.
tools.name: interspire_sensitive_field_query

tools.description: Read redacted Interspire global settings for email, bounce, and cron.

max_fields_per_section.description: Maximum returned fields per settings section. Defaults to 200 and is capped at 500.
